ns0:entry.ns0:title: [gdscript] godothub/konado
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/godothub/konado
Language: gdscript
Konado is a dialogue creation toolkit for the Godot Engine, with templates and a dialogue manager to help you quickly build Visual Novels, Gal Games, RPGs and other story‑driven projects.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] googleprojectzero/0days-in-the-wild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleprojectzero/0days-in-the-wild
Language: html
Repository for information about 0-days exploited in-the-wild.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [lua] opensubtitles/vlsub-opensubtitles-com
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensubtitles/vlsub-opensubtitles-com
Language: lua
VLC extension for downloading subtitles from OpenSubtitles.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] orangecoding/fredy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/orangecoding/fredy
Language: javascript
❤️ Fredy - [F]ind [R]eal [E]state [D]amn Eas[y] - Fredy keeps searching for new apartments, houses, and flats in Germany on platforms like ImmoScout24, Immowelt, Immonet, eBay Kleinanzeigen, and WG-Gesucht and instantly delivers the results to you via Slack, Telegram, Email, Discord or ntfy, so you can focus on the more important things in life ;)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] xuanyustudio/LocalMiniDrama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xuanyustudio/LocalMiniDrama
Language: javascript
🎬 seedance2接入 开源本地 AI 短剧 & 漫剧生成工具 —— 从故事到成片一站式完成，数据不出本机，短剧工作流管理平台，高灵活度，AI真人剧，AI漫剧本地搞定。 Open-source local AI short drama maker: story → storyboard → video, fully offline, your data stays yours. 纳米流水线

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [unknown] eeeeeeeeee-code/POC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eeeeeeeeee-code/POC
Language: unknown
备份的漏洞库，3月开始我们来维护

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [php] Azure-Samples/laravel-tasks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure-Samples/laravel-tasks
Language: php
A simple Laravel application that demonstrates how to build data-driven PHP apps in Azure App Service.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] sartoopjj/thefeed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sartoopjj/thefeed
Language: go
DNS-based feed reader for Telegram channels and public X accounts. Designed for environments where only DNS queries work.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] Octane0411/open-vibe-island
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Octane0411/open-vibe-island
Language: swift
The open-source alternative to vibe-island, designed for heavy code agent users, supporting cc/codex/opencode, terminal/ghostty/cmux/kaku/iterm. 开源的vibe-island替代品，为重度code agent用户设计，支持cc/codex/opencode, terminal/ghostty/cmux/kaku/iterm

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aenu1/aps3e
Language: c++
An experimental Android PS3 emulator, ported and optimized based on RPCS3.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eltavine/Duck-Detector-Refactoring
Language: kotlin
Android environment integrity inspection tool for root, hook, bootloader, SELinux, virtualization, and attestation signals

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c#] ValveResourceFormat/ValveResourceFormat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ValveResourceFormat/ValveResourceFormat
Language: c%23
Source 2 Viewer is an all-in-one tool to browse VPK archives, view, extract, and decompile Source 2 assets, including maps, models, materials, textures, sounds, and more.
